name: The Smile Beneath
description: This model gains the following ability:

granted_abilities.name: Your Face, Your Eyes
granted_abilities.text: This model is affected by the enemy crew card as if it were a unique model allied to the enemy leader, but it may not affect or use power bars, attach upgrades, or summon models. This model considers enemy non-Scheme, non-Strategy markers to be friendly and not enemy. Remove this upgrade after this model suffers more than 2 damage from a single attack.

extraction_notes: The Limitations section shows a single dash '-' indicating no limitations apply to this upgrade.
